- legal_services: Present with service and cost. Count as covered.
- moving_services: Present with service and cost. Count as covered.
- setup_services: Present with service and cost. Count as covered.
- total_budget: Present with cost breakdown and total. Count as covered.
All 6 conceptual items are included, despite one key mislabeled and an extra 'property_survey' field.
